tasks.subject: Task 0: Feature mapping module + dependency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert a cicflowmeter flow record into a {FEATURE_COLUMNS: float} dict the Detector accepts, with bad-value guards.

**Files:** Create backend/live/__init__.py, backend/live/features.py, backend/live/test_features.py; Modify backend/requirements.txt.

**Acceptance Criteria:** map_flow returns exactly FEATURE_COLUMNS keys; bad/NaN/inf coerce to 0.0; missing columns raise KeyError.

**Verify:** cd backend && ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest live/test_features.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/live/features.py", "backend/live/test_features.py", "backend/requirements.txt"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest live/test_features.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["map_flow returns exactly FEATURE_COLUMNS keys", "bad/NaN/inf values coerce to 0.0", "missing source columns raise KeyError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Live capture core
tasks.description:
**Goal:** LiveCapture consumes a flow iterator, keeps only attacker-IP flows, scores with Detector, calls callback on non-BENIGN.

**Files:** Create backend/live/capture.py, backend/live/test_capture.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** non-attacker flows skipped; non-BENIGN triggers callback; BENIGN does not.

**Verify:** cd backend && ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest live/test_capture.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/live/capture.py", "backend/live/test_capture.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest live/test_capture.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["non-attacker flows skipped", "non-BENIGN triggers callback", "BENIGN does not trigger callback"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Simulator live-overlay integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thread-safe push_live_attack() + overlay live detection on host (ATK) node links for a few ticks, clearing after TTL.

**Files:** Modify backend/mesh/simulator.py, backend/mesh/test_simulator.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** overlay sets host-node links to pushed label, threat non-NOMINAL; clears after TTL; push_live_attack lock-guarded.

**Verify:** cd backend && ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest mesh/test_simulator.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/mesh/simulator.py", "backend/mesh/test_simulator.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest mesh/test_simulator.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["overlay sets host-node links to pushed label, threat non-NOMINAL", "overlay clears after TTL", "push_live_attack lock-guarded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Production flow source + env-gated wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real cicflowmeter-backed flow iterator + env-gated startup launching LiveCapture only when enabled.

**Files:** Create backend/live/flow_source.py, backend/live/wiring.py, backend/live/test_wiring.py; Modify backend/app.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** disabled when env unset (None); disabled when attacker ip missing (None); app imports and startup hook wired.

**Verify:** cd backend && ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest live/test_wiring.py -v && ./.venv/bin/python -c 'import app'

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/live/flow_source.py", "backend/live/wiring.py", "backend/live/test_wiring.py", "backend/app.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest live/test_wiring.py -v && ./.venv/bin/python -c 'import app'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["disabled when env unset returns None", "disabled when attacker ip missing returns None", "app imports and startup hook wired"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Two-laptop rig verification + runbook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the full path on the two-laptop rig (real nmap/hping3 → ATK node lights up with right class) and document launch steps.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user. Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently with output captured.

**Files:** Modify docs/DEMO_SCRIPT.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:** cicflowmeter columns reconciled with FLOW_FEATURE_MAP; backend starts with live-capture env vars; nmap -sS shows PortScan within ~2s; hping3 flood shows DoS and clears after stop; runbook added to DEMO_SCRIPT.md.

**Verify:** Manual on the rig — observe dashboard ATK links + event feed during nmap/hping3 from laptop 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/DEMO_SCRIPT.md", "backend/live/features.py"], "verifyCommand": "manual: observe dashboard ATK links + event feed during nmap/hping3 from laptop 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cicflowmeter column names reconciled with FLOW_FEATURE_MAP", "backend starts with live-capture env vars", "nmap -sS shows PortScan within ~2s", "hping3 flood shows DoS and clears after stop", "runbook added to DEMO_SCRIPT.md"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "all"}
```
